description_long: This is a maroon-colored plastic tube labeled 'natura ESSENCIAL SUPREME' and designed for holding 75 ml of balm, specifically a post-shave lotion. The tube has a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a tapered cylindrical shape, widening at the base and narrowing toward the cap. The front displays the brand and product name in white text, while the back contains usage instructions and additional product information in smaller white print. The cap is integrated at the bottom, likely a screw-on or snap-on style, and is the same color as the tube. The overall design is minimalist, with only a small logo and text as graphic elements. This type of packaging is typical for personal care products and is intended to be portable and easy to dispense by squeezing.
description: A maroon, tapered plastic tube for post-shave balm with minimalist white text and a matching cap, designed for easy squeezing and portability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brand 'natura', product name 'ESSENCIAL SUPREME', and volume details in white text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tube's slim, tapered profile with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed usage instructions and product information in small white print.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tube's narrow profile with minimal visible features.
